subject: Reset your Elidune password
body_plain:
You requested a password reset for your Elidune account.

Click the link below to reset your password:
{{reset_url}}

This link expires in 30 minutes.

If the link does not work, copy this token into the reset form:
{{token}}

If you did not request this reset, you can ignore this email.
body_html:
You requested a password reset for your Elidune account.

Click here to reset your password

This link expires in 30 minutes.

If the link does not work, copy this token into the reset form:

{{token}}

If you did not request this reset, you can ignore this email.
